name: BEST_WINDOW_HORIZON_HOURS
description: How many forecast hours ahead to search for the calmest sailing window.

name: BEST_WINDOW_SIZE_HOURS
description: Number of consecutive forecast hours that make up a sailing window.

name: COMPASS_DIRECTIONS
description: Number of cardinal/intercardinal directions to analyze (8 = N/NE/E/SE/S/SW/W/NW)

name: DEFAULT_FORECAST_HOURS
description: Number of hours of forecast data to fetch from Open-Meteo

name: DIRECTION_BATCH_SIZE
description: Number of directions to fetch in parallel per batch (2 = 4 API calls per batch). Lower = safer for rate limits, higher = faster.

name: DIRECTION_SAMPLE_DISTANCE_NM
description: Distance in nautical miles to sample weather in each compass direction

name: ROUTE_DEFAULT_SPEED_KNOTS
description: Default boat speed (knots) used for route-plan ETA when the request omits speed. Tunable.

name: ROUTE_HEADWIND_ANGLE_DEG
description: Half-angle (degrees) within which the wind's FROM direction must align with the leg bearing to count as a headwind.

name: ROUTE_HEADWIND_MIN_KNOTS
description: Minimum wind speed (knots) for a head-on wind to be flagged as a headwind risk.

name: ROUTE_LOW_VIS_CLOUD_PCT
description: Cloud cover (%) at or above which a leg is flagged as low visibility (fog/overcast proxy).

name: ROUTE_LOW_VIS_PRECIP_MM
description: Precipitation (mm/h) at or above which a leg is flagged as low visibility.

name: ROUTE_MAX_WAYPOINTS
description: Maximum number of user waypoints in a route (excludes the boat origin). Bounds the per-leg weather API calls.

name: ROUTE_PRESSURE_DROP_HPA
description: Hour-over-hour pressure fall (hPa) at or above which a leg is flagged for a pressure drop nearby.

name: ROUTE_PRESSURE_LOW_HPA
description: Mean sea-level pressure (hPa) at or below which a leg is flagged for a nearby low-pressure system.

name: TIMELINE_PLAY_INTERVAL_MS
description: Milliseconds between auto-advance steps when playing the forecast timeline

name: WIND_GUST_ALERT_THRESHOLD_KNOTS
description: Default wind gust alert threshold in knots for GET /api/wind-alert. Gusts strictly greater than this flag an alert. Overridable per-request via the optional `threshold` query param.
